name: Hotels & Hospitality

tools.name: fb_waste
tools.description: Finds F&B outlets ordering based on optimistic occupancy, resulting in food waste
tools.query:
FROM hotel-food-orders
| STATS
    total_ordered = SUM(covers_ordered),
    total_served = SUM(covers_served),
    total_cost = SUM(food_cost_usd)
  BY outlet_id, meal_period
| EVAL
    cover_waste_pct = TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered - total_served) / TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered),
    wasted_cost = total_cost * cover_waste_pct
| WHERE cover_waste_pct > 0.20
| SORT wasted_cost DESC
| LIMIT 20

tools.name: vacant_hvac
tools.description: Finds rooms running climate control while confirmed vacant for hours
tools.query:
FROM room-occupancy
| WHERE is_occupied == false AND hvac_runtime_minutes > 60
| STATS
    total_hvac_hours = SUM(hvac_runtime_minutes) / 60,
    vacant_events = COUNT(*)
  BY floor_id
| WHERE total_hvac_hours > 50
| SORT total_hvac_hours DESC
| LIMIT 20

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed at a hotel or hospitality group.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — FB_OVER_PROCUREMENT: Food ordered based on optimistic occupancy forecasts.
TYPE 2 — VACANT_ROOM_HVAC: Climate control running in rooms confirmed vacant 4+ hours.
TYPE 3 — MINIBAR_RESTOCKING_CHURN: Minibars restocked for very short stays.

## CONSTRAINTS
Check event-calendar index before flagging F&B waste on conference days.
Room HVAC anomalies must be confirmed by key-card data, not just booking data.
